Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix 500 and 406 errors on student login and assignment access

- Fix 500 error when updating last_login due to RLS policy recursion \(42P17\)
  - Users need to apply RLS policy fix in Supabase Dashboard
  - Add migration for alternative RPC function approach
- Fix 406 error when student accesses assignment for first time
  - Change .single\(\) to .maybeSingle\(\) for progress query
  - Returns null instead of error when no progress record exists

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
